anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: This markdown maps mechanism standard propagation to std_microcosm_mechanism, the mechanism doctrine kind, and standards-meta diagnostics because standard changes must be reflected in validators and generated health before they govern mechanism nodes.

This markdown maps mechanism standard propagation to std_microcosm_mechanism, the mechanism doctrine kind, and standards-meta diagnostics because standard changes must be reflected in validators and generated health before they govern mechanism nodes.
Skill source mapping names this concept as an applied doctrine boundary.
Skill source mapping names this mechanism as an operational dependency.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: This markdown maps mechanism standard propagation to std_microcosm_mechanism, the mechanism doctrine kind, and standards-meta diagnostics because standard changes must be reflected in validators and generated health before they govern mechanism nodes.

statement: Microcosm Mechanism Refine Standard And Propagate
title: Microcosm Mechanism Refine Standard And Propagate
triggers: A reusable mechanism invariant belongs in std_microcosm_mechanism rather than one mechanism row.
Changing the mechanism standard alters source-row, edge, receipt, support, or projection validation behavior.
workflow: Prove the invariant from live mechanism evidence before editing the standard.
Update validators and builder logic so support, witness gaps, and authority boundaries are computed.
Regenerate the lattice and leave every unsupported mechanism claim as typed residual pressure.
